TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Sirayacu, title = Sirayacu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sirayacu} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == SirayacuŤ•ŅśčČťõÖśóŹ Sirayacu "Siraya a kamu, Siraya", Taywan a Yincumincu, tungusay nu natimulan a mincu, angangan maliwaliwah i Cya-nan a enal. Taywan nisulitan i likisiay "Formosan" han nu tau a pangangan "Formosan", zumaay teked nitiyunga u Sirayacu a tademaw. 19 . nilaculan 19 . 19 lasubu a micah zayhan u layak misawacu mialaw tu lala', zuma Siraya a tademaw haymaw pasawali mabulaw, malimad muengen i Pusung, Kalinkuan. kanahatu masetul nu layak, maliwan tu ku nu babalaki a salisin atu kamu, sinmung migingkiway pasasuma tu Pinpucu. ayza caay henay ka palatatenga'en nu Cowng-hwa-min-kow cung-yang cenbu, ayzaay tu a mihcaan mikawaw palekal pangangan, milunguc tu cenbu patatenga' u Yincumin kami asaan. Sirayacu u A-li-cu ku kakayzaan, iza aca ku "misalisin tu puduk a mincu" a ngangan, nika tatenga' Sirayacu caay ku misalisinay tu puduk, uyza u masikaz tu puduk mahiza icelangay a nanum nu tuas. kakayzaan a ngangan nu binacadan ",śėĮ"Siraya" (Raleigh Ferrel)Ť™ćÁāļśėĮ" A¬∑ťėŅŚĺ∑śčČÁąĺ(Karl A. Adelaar)ŚČáŤ™ćÁāļ"raya" Siraya "ťĀĒśāü" . "Sirayacu" uyni layak nisulitan kasumamadan mikilim ci Cang-yaw-cian i 1951 a mihcaan nisulitan tu "Pinpucu-se a ngangan pasasuazih tu nisulitan, u "Siraya" uyni pangiha aimi. Siraya nuyaanay a imin, migingkiway tu kamu ci bey-li-low "Raeigh Ferrel" nasa u "nuwalianay a tademaw" "labu nu buyu'ay a tademaw" "labuay a tademaw" natimulan kamu nu mipasubana'ay ci Ka-al.A. A-te-la-al nasa "raya" u talabuay a imi, sisa Sirayacu taneng micuyaku u "talabuay a tademaw", mipasubana'ay ci S-wan-su nasa Siraya nu Taywan layak a kamu "sepat ta-se" niyul a ngiha, mipasubana'ay ci Twan-hung-kun duduc pikuwan nu Lipun a ziday mipasubana'ay nikinsaan tu niciluan, nasa Sirayacu uyza u "tademaw" sanay a imi, mahiniay Taucu "Tau" "Tao,Tau". i Helan a zidayan nikinsaan tu tademaw, Sing-kang-se pakala tu 900 ku tademaw, Mu-cya-wan-se pakala tu 8,900 ku tademaw, Ma-tow-se pakala tu 1300 ku tademaw, Siyaw-lung-se ku sakatuuday a tademaw macapi tu 2000. Taywan nuwalian a Sirayacu "Ś§ßśĽŅšļļ"(Taivoan), . 1829 a mihca malingatu, zuma a Sirayacu haymaw pasawali mabulaw, malimad mueneng i Kalingku nu Pusku, Pailasan, Pusung a Fanaw Lilong, Kakacawan, Singku, patizeng tu niyazu', Kow-ing-san, Wan-zen-pu, sin-kwang-aw, Pung-ce-cun a niyazu'an, uzuma satabakiay a niyazu', nika makay singku caay kalecad. patatenga' kaku mibuheci tu lalekalan a lala', sawalian mabulaw a tademaw sakatuuday makay Takaway, Pintung a Taulungcu "Tamancu" atu Makatawcu, Sirayacu caay kakatuud, tinaku kasumamadan tizaay a binacadan hatu nipangangan "Tamancu" "Taivoan" han, tahkalay a singku angangan nu Taulungcu a singku. singku misalisin tu puduk . Sirayacu a tademaw kakayzaan a singku angangan u ba-lin a singku, Sirayacu a tademaw palekal tu micidekay kasikaz tu puduk. misalisin tu puduk sakay Sirayacu mahizaay u tuas, u heni i puduk, linking, landaway kaysing, caykeng papazengan labu pazeng han ku nanum amisalisin tuynian a papazengan. sapisalisin a puduk izaw ku canacanan a pudukan, payluma' kasikaz tu masazuma a puduk, uzip nu puduk tungusay cayay kalecad ku tuas, u singanganay A-li a tuas nu katuuday a tuasan uzuma a nipagangan. labi a salisin atu demiad a la'dis . paymihcaan Sirayacu palekal tu labi a salisi, pasazumaen Ta-ney-to-se Tay-cu labi a salisin atu Ci-pey-swa-A-li-mu labi a salisinan lalangawan a kawaw. Tow-se-Tay-cu labi a salisin i paymihcaan katukuh 10 tu teben nu bulad palekal, uyni a salisin sakay binawlan a imian malecad tu nu zumaay Yincumin a lalikid atu nu layakay a pulecuhan nu kamisama, zuma misalisinay nu A-li-cu. nipatateng' nu cenbu . Taynan a kuwan cenbu i 2005 a mihcaan saayaw patatenga' tu Sirayacu nu "kuwan a nipanutekan a Yincumicu", 2010 a mihcaan kuwan kenis papulung han zikuz, Taynan cebu patatenga' u "Taynan nipatatenga' a Yincumicu". 2013 a mihcaan, Kalingku a kuwan pailasan a Yakuba mikilul tu a patatenga'. . Siryacu pinaaytu a mihcaan palekal pangangan, nika caay patatenga'en nu cenbu, sabeleng satu pahulic ku binawlan. 2011 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 21 a demiad Taypak talakaway sin-cen-yen paketun mapanukas ku nipahulican, tungusay mademec, caay pakahamhem ku binawlan lalid sa pahuing. . imahini sakakaay nu cenbu nipatatenga'an singangan tu Yincumincu, Taynan cenbu dada' patatenga'an u "nipatatenga'an nu cenbu a Yincumincu" atu Kalingku Pailasan nipatatenga'an nu yakuba syang-tin a Yincumincu". sin-cen-yen i 2020 a mihcaan maawasay masumad singangan tu Yincumincu hulic cunus tu Pinpu Yincumina pasasizuma, halhal tu paulicay maawas ku tulu nisulitan nu hulic a panukas singangan tu Yincumincu. angangan migingki tu nasulitan . Sirayacu pinaay tu a mihcaan mala layakay tu, mahaminaytu malawpes ku lalangawan, namahiza migingkiway tu Sirayacu amiida tu naayaway nipatizeng tu zumaay a nisulitan, angangan kasumamadan izaw ci Cen-ti "tung-ban-ci", Taywan pidebungan nu Helan a ziday nisupedan nu cenbu atu niciluan nu cwan-cyaw-s, atu nisulitan tu kakitizaan, sacidekay ni Hwang-su-cin a " ban-su liw-kaw" atu 67 a "ban-se-cay-hung-tu", yadah ku nisulitan itawya Sirayacu a nikauzip a kawaw, u kagingkiwan nu iluciluc tu nisubelidan a kasatiman siacaay a nisulitan tu naemekan. kining atu nisupedan a lalangawan ÁīÄŚŅĶŤąáśĖáŚĆĖšŅĚŚ≠ė sakay Sirayacu pisuped tu lalangawan saicelangan ci Su-ban-ce u kawaw i Taynan a kuwan cebu, ci Su-ban-ce pikawawan niza patizeng tu Taywan saayaway a kuwanan Yincumincu wiy-ye-huy "Taynan a kuwan Siraya Yincumincu mikawaway wiy-yenhuy".
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == siraja ¶u**** siraja ¶u "siraja a kamu, siraja", tajwan a jin ¶umin ¶u, tuŇčusaj nu natimur~…ĺan a min ¶u, aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i ¶ja-nan a …ônar~…ĺ. tajwan nisur~…ĺitan i r~…ĺikisiaj "formosan" ńßan nu tau a paŇčaŇčan "formosan", zumaaj t…ôk…ôd nitijuŇča u siraja ¶u a tad…ômaw. ** . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ** . ** r~…ĺasubu a mi ¶ańß zajńßan u r~…ĺajak misawa ¶u miar~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, zuma siraja a tad…ômaw ńßajmaw pasawar~…ĺi mabur~…ĺaw, mar~…ĺimad mu…ôŇč…ôn i pusuŇč, kar~…ĺinkuan. kanańßatu mas…ôtur~…ĺ nu r~…ĺajak, mar~…ĺiwan tu ku nu babar~…ĺaki a sar~…ĺisin atu kamu, sinmuŇč migiŇčkiwaj pasasuma tu pinpu ¶u. ajza ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ °…ôn nu ¶owŇč-ńßwa-min-kow ¶uŇč-jaŇč ¶…ônbu, ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mikawaw par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ paŇčaŇčan, mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu ¶…ônbu patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° u jin ¶umin kami asaan. siraja ¶u u a-r~…ĺi- ¶u ku kakajzaan, iza a ¶a ku "misar~…ĺisin tu puduk a min ¶u" a ŇčaŇčan, nika tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° siraja ¶u ¶aaj ku misar~…ĺisinaj tu puduk, ujza u masikaz tu puduk mańßiza i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a nanum nu tuas. kakajzaan a ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan ",*"siraja" (*ar~…ĺ…ôigńß f…ôrr…ôr~…ĺ)***" a*****(karr~…ĺ a. ad…ôr~…ĺaar)***"raja" siraja "**" . "siraja ¶u" ujni r~…ĺajak nisur~…ĺitan kasumamadan mikir~…ĺim ¶i ¶aŇč-jaw- ¶ian i **** a mińß ¶aan nisur~…ĺitan tu "pinpu ¶u-s…ô a ŇčaŇčan pasasuazińß tu nisur~…ĺitan, u "siraja" ujni paŇčińßa aimi. siraja nujaanaj a imin, migiŇčkiwaj tu kamu ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺow "*a…ôigńß f…ôrr…ôr~…ĺ" nasa u "nuwar~…ĺianaj a tad…ômaw" "r~…ĺabu nu buju Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw" "r~…ĺabuaj a tad…ômaw" natimur~…ĺan kamu nu mipasubana Ē~ °aj ¶i ka-ar~…ĺ.a. a-t…ô-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ nasa "raja" u tar~…ĺabuaj a imi, sisa siraja ¶u tan…ôŇč mi ¶ujaku u "tar~…ĺabuaj a tad…ômaw", mipasubana Ē~ °aj ¶i s-wan-su nasa siraja nu tajwan r~…ĺajak a kamu "s…ôpat ta-s…ô" nijur~…ĺ a Ňčińßa, mipasubana Ē~ °aj ¶i twan-ńßuŇč-kun dudu ¶ pikuwan nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj mipasubana Ē~ °aj nikinsaan tu ni ¶ir~…ĺuan, nasa siraja ¶u ujza u "tad…ômaw" sanaj a imi, mańßiniaj tau ¶u "tau" "tao,tau". i ńß…ôr~…ĺan a zidajan nikinsaan tu tad…ômaw, siŇč-kaŇč-s…ô pakar~…ĺa tu *** ku tad…ômaw, mu- ¶ja-wan-s…ô pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** ku tad…ômaw, ma-tow-s…ô pakar~…ĺa tu **** ku tad…ômaw, sijaw-r~…ĺuŇč-s…ô ku sakatuudaj a tad…ômaw ma ¶api tu ****. tajwan nuwar~…ĺian a siraja ¶u "***"(tai*oan), . **** a mińß ¶a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, zuma a siraja ¶u ńßajmaw pasawar~…ĺi mabur~…ĺaw, mar~…ĺimad mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku nu pusku, pair~…ĺasan, pusuŇč a fanaw r~…ĺir~…ĺoŇč, kaka ¶awan, siŇčku, patiz…ôŇč tu nijazu Ē~ °, kow-iŇč-san, wan-z…ôn-pu, sin-kwaŇč-aw, puŇč- ¶…ô- ¶un a nijazu Ē~ °an, uzuma satabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ °, nika makaj siŇčku ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° kaku mibuńß…ô ¶i tu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, sawar~…ĺian mabur~…ĺaw a tad…ômaw sakatuudaj makaj takawaj, pintuŇč a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u "taman ¶u" atu makataw ¶u, siraja ¶u ¶aaj kakatuud, tinaku kasumamadan tizaaj a bina ¶adan ńßatu nipaŇčaŇčan "taman ¶u" "tai*oan" ńßan, tańßkar~…ĺaj a siŇčku aŇčaŇčan nu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a siŇčku. siŇčku misar~…ĺisin tu puduk . siraja ¶u a tad…ômaw kakajzaan a siŇčku aŇčaŇčan u ba-r~…ĺin a siŇčku, siraja ¶u a tad…ômaw par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu mi ¶id…ôkaj kasikaz tu puduk. misar~…ĺisin tu puduk sakaj siraja ¶u mańßizaaj u tuas, u ńß…ôni i puduk, r~…ĺinkiŇč, r~…ĺandawaj kajsiŇč, ¶ajk…ôŇč papaz…ôŇčan r~…ĺabu paz…ôŇč ńßan ku nanum amisar~…ĺisin tujnian a papaz…ôŇčan. sapisar~…ĺisin a puduk izaw ku ¶ana ¶anan a pudukan, pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kasikaz tu masazuma a puduk, uzip nu puduk tuŇčusaj ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tuas, u siŇčaŇčanaj a-r~…ĺi a tuas nu katuudaj a tuasan uzuma a nipagaŇčan. r~…ĺabi a sar~…ĺisin atu d…ômiad a r~…ĺa Ē~ °dis . pajmińß ¶aan siraja ¶u par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺabi a sar~…ĺisi, pasazuma…ôn ta-n…ô-to-s…ô taj- ¶u r~…ĺabi a sar~…ĺisin atu ¶i-p…ô-swa-a-r~…ĺi-mu r~…ĺabi a sar~…ĺisinan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kawaw. tow-s…ô-taj- ¶u r~…ĺabi a sar~…ĺisin i pajmińß ¶aan katukuńß ** tu t…ôb…ôn nu bur~…ĺad par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, ujni a sar~…ĺisin sakaj binawr~…ĺan a imian mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu zumaaj jin ¶umin a r~…ĺar~…ĺikid atu nu r~…ĺajakaj a pur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nu kamisama, zuma misar~…ĺisinaj nu a-r~…ĺi- ¶u. nipatat…ôŇč Ē~ ° nu ¶…ônbu . tajnan a kuwan ¶…ônbu i **** a mińß ¶aan saajaw patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu siraja ¶u nu "kuwan a nipanut…ôkan a jin ¶umi ¶u", **** a mińß ¶aan kuwan k…ônis papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan zikuz, tajnan ¶…ôbu patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° u "tajnan nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a jin ¶umi ¶u". **** a mińß ¶aan, kar~…ĺiŇčku a kuwan pair~…ĺasan a jakuba mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu a patat…ôŇča Ē~ °. . sirja ¶u pinaajtu a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ paŇčaŇčan, nika ¶aaj patat…ôŇča Ē~ °…ôn nu ¶…ônbu, sab…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč satu pańßur~…ĺi ¶ ku binawr~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tajpak tar~…ĺakawaj sin- ¶…ôn-j…ôn pak…ôtun mapanukas ku nipańßur~…ĺi ¶an, tuŇčusaj mad…ôm…ô ¶, ¶aaj pakańßamńß…ôm ku binawr~…ĺan r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa pańßuiŇč. . imańßini sakakaaj nu ¶…ônbu nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an siŇčaŇčan tu jin ¶umin ¶u, tajnan ¶…ônbu dada Ē~ ° patat…ôŇča Ē~ °an u "nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an nu ¶…ônbu a jin ¶umin ¶u" atu kar~…ĺiŇčku pair~…ĺasan nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an nu jakuba sjaŇč-tin a jin ¶umin ¶u". sin- ¶…ôn-j…ôn i **** a mińß ¶aan maawasaj masumad siŇčaŇčan tu jin ¶umin ¶u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ¶unus tu pinpu jin ¶umina pasasizuma, ńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu paur~…ĺi ¶aj maawas ku tur~…ĺu nisur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a panukas siŇčaŇčan tu jin ¶umin ¶u. aŇčaŇčan migiŇčki tu nasur~…ĺitan . siraja ¶u pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajakaj tu, mańßaminajtu mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, namańßiza migiŇčkiwaj tu siraja ¶u amiida tu naajawaj nipatiz…ôŇč tu zumaaj a nisur~…ĺitan, aŇčaŇčan kasumamadan izaw ¶i ¶…ôn-ti "tuŇč-ban- ¶i", tajwan pid…ôbuŇčan nu ńß…ôr~…ĺan a zidaj nisup…ôdan nu ¶…ônbu atu ni ¶ir~…ĺuan nu ¶wan- ¶jaw-s, atu nisur~…ĺitan tu kakitizaan, sa ¶id…ôkaj ni ńßwaŇč-su- ¶in a " ban-su r~…ĺiw-kaw" atu ** a "ban-s…ô- ¶aj-ńßuŇč-tu", jadańß ku nisur~…ĺitan itawja siraja ¶u a nikauzip a kawaw, u kagiŇčkiwan nu ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ tu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a kasatiman sia ¶aaj a nisur~…ĺitan tu na…ôm…ôkan. kiniŇč atu nisup…ôdan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ******* sakaj siraja ¶u pisup…ôd tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan ¶i su-ban- ¶…ô u kawaw i tajnan a kuwan ¶…ôbu, ¶i su-ban- ¶…ô pikawawan niza patiz…ôŇč tu tajwan saajawaj a kuwanan jin ¶umin ¶u wij-j…ô-ńßuj "tajnan a kuwan siraja jin ¶umin ¶u mikawawaj wij-j…ônńßuj".
S.FORM: == kakiliman == SirayacuŤ•ŅśčČťõÖśóŹ Sirayacu "Siraya a kamu, Siraya", Taywan a Yincumincu, tungusay nu natimulan a mincu, angangan maliwaliwah i Cya-nan a enal. Taywan nisulitan i likisiay "Formosan" han nu tau a pangangan "Formosan", zumaay teked nitiyunga u Sirayacu a tademaw. 19 . nilaculan 19 . 19 lasubu a micah zayhan u layak misawacu mialaw tu lala', zuma Siraya a tademaw haymaw pasawali mabulaw, malimad muengen i Pusung, Kalinkuan. kanahatu masetul nu layak, maliwan tu ku nu babalaki a salisin atu kamu, sinmung migingkiway pasasuma tu Pinpucu. ayza caay henay ka palatatenga'en nu Cowng-hwa-min-kow cung-yang cenbu, ayzaay tu a mihcaan mikawaw palekal pangangan, milunguc tu cenbu patatenga' u Yincumin kami asaan. Sirayacu u A-li-cu ku kakayzaan, iza aca ku "misalisin tu puduk a mincu" a ngangan, nika tatenga' Sirayacu caay ku misalisinay tu puduk, uyza u masikaz tu puduk mahiza icelangay a nanum nu tuas. kakayzaan a ngangan nu binacadan ",śėĮ"Siraya" (Raleigh Ferrel)Ť™ćÁāļśėĮ" A¬∑ťėŅŚĺ∑śčČÁąĺ(Karl A. Adelaar)ŚČáŤ™ćÁāļ"raya" Siraya "ťĀĒśāü" . "Sirayacu" uyni layak nisulitan kasumamadan mikilim ci Cang-yaw-cian i 1951 a mihcaan nisulitan tu "Pinpucu-se a ngangan pasasuazih tu nisulitan, u "Siraya" uyni pangiha aimi. Siraya nuyaanay a imin, migingkiway tu kamu ci bey-li-low "Raeigh Ferrel" nasa u "nuwalianay a tademaw" "labu nu buyu'ay a tademaw" "labuay a tademaw" natimulan kamu nu mipasubana'ay ci Ka-al.A. A-te-la-al nasa "raya" u talabuay a imi, sisa Sirayacu taneng micuyaku u "talabuay a tademaw", mipasubana'ay ci S-wan-su nasa Siraya nu Taywan layak a kamu "sepat ta-se" niyul a ngiha, mipasubana'ay ci Twan-hung-kun duduc pikuwan nu Lipun a ziday mipasubana'ay nikinsaan tu niciluan, nasa Sirayacu uyza u "tademaw" sanay a imi, mahiniay Taucu "Tau" "Tao,Tau". i Helan a zidayan nikinsaan tu tademaw, Sing-kang-se pakala tu 900 ku tademaw, Mu-cya-wan-se pakala tu 8,900 ku tademaw, Ma-tow-se pakala tu 1300 ku tademaw, Siyaw-lung-se ku sakatuuday a tademaw macapi tu 2000. Taywan nuwalian a Sirayacu "Ś§ßśĽŅšļļ"(Taivoan), . 1829 a mihca malingatu, zuma a Sirayacu haymaw pasawali mabulaw, malimad mueneng i Kalingku nu Pusku, Pailasan, Pusung a Fanaw Lilong, Kakacawan, Singku, patizeng tu niyazu', Kow-ing-san, Wan-zen-pu, sin-kwang-aw, Pung-ce-cun a niyazu'an, uzuma satabakiay a niyazu', nika makay singku caay kalecad. patatenga' kaku mibuheci tu lalekalan a lala', sawalian mabulaw a tademaw sakatuuday makay Takaway, Pintung a Taulungcu "Tamancu" atu Makatawcu, Sirayacu caay kakatuud, tinaku kasumamadan tizaay a binacadan hatu nipangangan "Tamancu" "Taivoan" han, tahkalay a singku angangan nu Taulungcu a singku. singku misalisin tu puduk . Sirayacu a tademaw kakayzaan a singku angangan u ba-lin a singku, Sirayacu a tademaw palekal tu micidekay kasikaz tu puduk. misalisin tu puduk sakay Sirayacu mahizaay u tuas, u heni i puduk, linking, landaway kaysing, caykeng papazengan labu pazeng han ku nanum amisalisin tuynian a papazengan. sapisalisin a puduk izaw ku canacanan a pudukan, payluma' kasikaz tu masazuma a puduk, uzip nu puduk tungusay cayay kalecad ku tuas, u singanganay A-li a tuas nu katuuday a tuasan uzuma a nipagangan. labi a salisin atu demiad a la'dis . paymihcaan Sirayacu palekal tu labi a salisi, pasazumaen Ta-ney-to-se Tay-cu labi a salisin atu Ci-pey-swa-A-li-mu labi a salisinan lalangawan a kawaw. Tow-se-Tay-cu labi a salisin i paymihcaan katukuh 10 tu teben nu bulad palekal, uyni a salisin sakay binawlan a imian malecad tu nu zumaay Yincumin a lalikid atu nu layakay a pulecuhan nu kamisama, zuma misalisinay nu A-li-cu. nipatateng' nu cenbu . Taynan a kuwan cenbu i 2005 a mihcaan saayaw patatenga' tu Sirayacu nu "kuwan a nipanutekan a Yincumicu", 2010 a mihcaan kuwan kenis papulung han zikuz, Taynan cebu patatenga' u "Taynan nipatatenga' a Yincumicu". 2013 a mihcaan, Kalingku a kuwan pailasan a Yakuba mikilul tu a patatenga'. . Siryacu pinaaytu a mihcaan palekal pangangan, nika caay patatenga'en nu cenbu, sabeleng satu pahulic ku binawlan. 2011 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 21 a demiad Taypak talakaway sin-cen-yen paketun mapanukas ku nipahulican, tungusay mademec, caay pakahamhem ku binawlan lalid sa pahuing. . imahini sakakaay nu cenbu nipatatenga'an singangan tu Yincumincu, Taynan cenbu dada' patatenga'an u "nipatatenga'an nu cenbu a Yincumincu" atu Kalingku Pailasan nipatatenga'an nu yakuba syang-tin a Yincumincu". sin-cen-yen i 2020 a mihcaan maawasay masumad singangan tu Yincumincu hulic cunus tu Pinpu Yincumina pasasizuma, halhal tu paulicay maawas ku tulu nisulitan nu hulic a panukas singangan tu Yincumincu. angangan migingki tu nasulitan . Sirayacu pinaay tu a mihcaan mala layakay tu, mahaminaytu malawpes ku lalangawan, namahiza migingkiway tu Sirayacu amiida tu naayaway nipatizeng tu zumaay a nisulitan, angangan kasumamadan izaw ci Cen-ti "tung-ban-ci", Taywan pidebungan nu Helan a ziday nisupedan nu cenbu atu niciluan nu cwan-cyaw-s, atu nisulitan tu kakitizaan, sacidekay ni Hwang-su-cin a " ban-su liw-kaw" atu 67 a "ban-se-cay-hung-tu", yadah ku nisulitan itawya Sirayacu a nikauzip a kawaw, u kagingkiwan nu iluciluc tu nisubelidan a kasatiman siacaay a nisulitan tu naemekan. kining atu nisupedan a lalangawan ÁīÄŚŅĶŤąáśĖáŚĆĖšŅĚŚ≠ė sakay Sirayacu pisuped tu lalangawan saicelangan ci Su-ban-ce u kawaw i Taynan a kuwan cebu, ci Su-ban-ce pikawawan niza patizeng tu Taywan saayaway a kuwanan Yincumincu wiy-ye-huy "Taynan a kuwan Siraya Yincumincu mikawaway wiy-yenhuy".
